text: Eleanor said the operations team finds Advanced Charting hard to discover and reverted to spreadsheets. Frustrated that the last training didn't stick.
Two screening batch failures in a fortnight. Eleanor is escalating internally; renewal conversation will be sensitive.
Henrik requested continuous monitoring of onboarded clients rather than periodic batch reviews. Said it would materially reduce manual effort.
Marcus loves the research workflow and asked whether AI could summarise long analyst notes for the morning meeting.
Only one analyst is using Case Management. Henrik open to rolling it out more widely if it saves time.
